data.title: AMC Deploys Prisma Prop Tech Resident Portal Platform Across Portfolio of Managed Multifamily Communities
data.description: In Utah and Georgia, Apartment Management Consultants (AMC) and Prisma Prop Tech are partnering to implement Prisma's resident portal and payments platform in over 900 apartment communities managed by AMC. By utilizing Prisma's platform and mobile app, AMC aims to enhance resident and owner experience by promoting prompt digital rent payments, offering various payment methods, providing resident rewards, and fostering loyalty.

data.description: Reporting live from Chiclayo, Peru, and surrounding areas delves into the rural upbringing that influenced Pope Leo. With a duration of one hour, this exclusive EWTN News program is set to showcase...

data.title: SOCCER 5 TO BRING NEW SOCCER EXPERIENCE TO SNOHOMISH COUNTY
data.description: The Blomberg family is launching an innovative and high-energy small-sided soccer concept in Snohomish County, Washington on May 1, 2026. Soccer 5® Snohomish County is set to introduce a unique soccer experience with a modern facility focused on creating inclusive opportunities for all. The facility will host small-sided games to enhance player engagement and skill development. The initiative aims to cater to a wide range of participants and promote an active lifestyle. The concept is expected to attract soccer enthusiasts of all ages and skill levels, offering an exciting and dynamic environment for the community.

data.title: Distributor Sees 25% Surge in Conversions After Website Redesign with Digital Silk
data.description: Miami-based Digital Silk, a top web design agency specializing in brand strategies, custom website design, and digital marketing, reveals the revamp and creation of an eCommerce site for USA Roller. The redesign aims to enhance the online shopping experience for USA Roller customers, improving brand visibility and driving sales. The agency's expertise in developing effective digital campaigns is expected to propel USA Roller's online growth.

data.title: Boss Design expands modular pod system to meet growing demand for flexible workplaces
data.description: In High Point, North Carolina, on April 28, 2026, workplaces in North America are increasingly moving towards flexible, hybrid models. This shift has led to a rising demand for versatile and well-designed pod solutions. In light of this trend, Boss Design has announced an expansion of its Mews collection to meet the growing needs of businesses.

data.title: Battelle-Led Environmental Monitoring and Remediation Technology Assessment Initiative (EMRTAI) Opens Call for Applications for Technology Assessments for Critical Mineral Recovery
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, the Environmental Monitoring and Remediation Technology Assessment Initiative (EMRTAI) has opened applications for technology assessments. The initiative is seeking proposals for recovering critical minerals from waste materials at Superfund legacy hard rock mine and mineral processing sites. Supported by the Environmental Protection Agency Office of Mountains, Deserts and Plains, EMRTAI is managed by Battelle through a cooperative agreement. Successful applicants will be granted the opportunity to participate in the program.

data.title: Boeing and Copa Airlines Announce Order for up to 60 737 MAX Jets
data.description: A major airline based in Panama is set to expand and update its entire fleet of Boeing 737 aircraft within the next eight years. Recently, it was disclosed that the carrier has made a significant purchase of 40 new 737 MAX airplanes from Boeing. This move is part of an agreement between Boeing and Copa Airlines, aimed at enhancing the airline's operations and services. The deal signifies a substantial investment in the airline's growth, with the new aircraft expected to play a key role in modernizing its fleet.

data.description: On April 14, 2026, in Hamilton, Ohio, Kruger & Hodges Hometown Injury Lawyers organized a continuing legal education seminar named Be Kind to Lawyers Day CLE 2026. The event aimed to equip legal professionals with practical strategies for immediate implementation.
